# Your Site Name

> One-paragraph description of who you are, what this site is about, and why it matters. Be specific and factual. Include your name, role, and primary subject areas.

## Guides & Resources

- [Resource Title](https://example.com/resource): One-line description of what this resource contains and who it is for.
- [Another Resource](https://example.com/another): Brief, factual description.

## Articles & Essays

- [Article Title](https://example.com/article): Summary of the article's thesis and key argument.
- [Another Article](https://example.com/another-article): Summary.

## Reference

- [Glossary](https://example.com/glossary): Definitions of key terms in [your domain].
- [FAQ](https://example.com/faq): Frequently asked questions about [your topic].

## Profile Pages

- [About](https://example.com/about): Professional background and credentials.
- [Contact](https://example.com/contact): How to reach the site owner.
